hero.name: Fábio Mendes
hero.summary: 12 years of solid experience in IT as a Full Stack Developer, Data Analyst, and technical support for infrastructure and systems. Combining deep technical knowledge with a strategic business vision, enabling the delivery of solutions that truly impact organizational results.

technologies.title: Technologies

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Some of the main projects I have developed, demonstrating expertise in multiple technologies

list.title: DW Health
list.description: Data Warehouse project for presenting reports, dashboards, and insights from Primary Healthcare EHR data according to management demand.

list.title: SIRD
list.description: Integrated Digital Regulation System with messaging via EvolutionAPI and N8N

list.title: EECG
list.description: Web system for automated analysis of electrocardiogram (ECG) exams from scanned PDF files, aiming to support clinical screening.

list.title: Lixeira&Cia
list.description: Marketplace for cleaning products, focusing on the sale of domestic and commercial trash cans. It has a responsive design, using modern React. For user login, it uses the Google OAuth 2.0 API, and has an administrative panel for store management.

list.title: BI Health OPPES
list.description: Power BI dashboard presenting production and financial metrics of municipal Health Units.

experiences.title: Experience
experiences.subtitle: Professional journey focused on development and data analysis

list.title: Data & Health Analyst at Diadema City Hall
list.description: Development of data warehouse solutions and dashboards for data analysis. ETL development. Task automation with AI agents. PostgreSQL database administration and Full Stack software development.

list.title: Systems Analyst at Diadema City Hall
list.description: Responsible for developing web systems for hospital maintenance and engineering, requirements analysis, and implementation of scalable solutions. Technical leadership in legacy system modernization projects.

list.title: IT Technician at Agaphone Telemática
list.description: Website development, email marketing, system installation, and CCTV equipment configuration.
